aifactinsight: New model from Chorma team with self-editing search capabilities, Multi-Hop Retrieval, Specialized Agent for downstream retrievals,
practicalUsage: For project having complex, fragmented information environments where you expects a relevant retrieval. Combine TurboQuant and Chroma Context-1 while building AI Projects

aifact: TurboQuant is an advanced, data-oblivious compression algorithm
aifactinsight: TurboQuant is meant to optimize the Key-Value (KV) cache, removing the main memory constraint during LLM inference
practicalUsage: Enables 4–6x longer context windows for LLMs on the same hardware and improves performance for vector databases. Combine TurboQuant and Chroma Context-1 while building AI Projects
